content.text:
<timestamp>Friday, May 15, 2026, 1:58 PM (UTC+8)</timestamp>
<user_query>
I need to analyze product pages for Oladance, Soundcore, Jabra, and Google headphone products to extract design patterns.

## Task

Fetch the following product pages and extract design patterns (page type, hero, sections, typography, colors, layout, CTA, copy style).

### Oladance
1. https://www.oladanceshop.com/pages/ows-pro (OWS Pro - flagship)
2. https://www.oladanceshop.com/pages/oladance-ows2 (OWS 2)

### Soundcore
1. https://us.soundcore.com/products/liberty-4-nc-a3947z11 (Liberty 4 NC)
2. https://us.soundcore.com/products/aerofit-pro-a3871011 (AeroFit Pro)

### Jabra
1. https://www.jabra.com/bluetooth-headsets/jabra-elite-10-gen-2 (Elite 10 Gen 2)
2. https://www.jabra.com/business/office-headsets/jabra-evolve/jabra-evolve2-85 (Evolve2 85)

### Google
1. https://store.google.com/product/pixel_buds_pro_2 (Pixel Buds Pro 2)

For each brand, analyze the same dimensions:
1. Visual identity (color scheme, dark/light)
2. Layout system
3. Typography
4. Hero pattern
5. Feature sections pattern
6. Purchase elements (combined or separate?)
7. Copy tone
8. Unique design elements

After analyzing all pages, provide a **style grouping recommendation** comparing to existing styles (Shokz/Apple/Beats/Bose) and the Sony/Samsung/Huawei group.

Save findings to `oladance-soundcore-jabra-google-patterns.md` in the workspace root at `c:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\IWE\`.
</user_query>

The user wants me to fetch multiple product pages from different headphone brands and analyze their design patterns. This is a substantial research task that involves fetching 7 URLs and analyzing them systematically. Let me start by fetching all the pages in parallel, then analyze and write the findings.

Let me begin by fetching all the URLs simultaneously.

部分页面没有正确加载（Oladance 超时、Jabra Elite 10 跳转到了支持页面）。让我用浏览器工具和搜索来补充数据。

Some pages didn't load well - Oladance OWS Pro timed out, OWS2 content couldn't be displayed, and Jabra Elite 10 Gen 2 gave a support page instead of the product page. Let me try fetching these again, and also try alternative URLs for Jabra and Oladance. Let me also try to use web search to find better URLs or cached versions.

Let me try:
1. Oladance OWS Pro again
2. Oladance OWS2 again
3. Jabra Elite 10 Gen 2 - try the US site or a different URL


4. For the pages that didn't render properly, I should switch to a browser-based approach since some of these sites are likely JavaScript-heavy and won't load correctly with standard fetching. I'll also search for information about these products to supplement what I can't retrieve directly.

input.search_term: Oladance OWS Pro product page design layout site:oladanceshop.com 2025
input.explanation: Searching for Oladance OWS Pro page info since the direct fetch timed out

input.search_term: Oladance OWS2 product page design layout site:oladanceshop.com
input.explanation: Searching for Oladance OWS2 page info since content couldn't be displayed

input.search_term: Jabra Elite 10 Gen 2 product page design layout jabra.com 2025
input.explanation: Searching for Jabra Elite 10 Gen 2 product page since it redirected to support

content.text:
I'm not getting the actual product page content for Jabra Elite 10 Gen 2 - it keeps redirecting to the support page. The main product page seems to be discontinued or redirected. Let me try the buy page URL and also read the text file that was downloaded from the search. Let me also try fetching the Oladance homepage text file, and also try fetching some more pages.

Let me read the downloaded files and try some alternative URLs.

input.search_term: Jabra Elite 10 Gen 2 product page design hero section features 2024
input.explanation: Need to find Jabra Elite 10 Gen 2 product page content since it's discontinued and redirects to support

input.search_term: oladance OWS Pro page design features hero section dark background 2024 2025
input.explanation: Need Oladance OWS Pro page design details since direct fetch keeps timing out
